title: Thorpeness via Wimpole Hall

main_route.excerpt: we met up with John + Kay + Eben at Wimpole Hall. lovely gardens. Socially distanced.
Off to Thorpeness with champagne + everyone except Charles + Austin. [...] I did a salad lunch then on to Thorpe.
Peter, Nana, Conrad, Nini + Gigi set off. ???

stops.excerpt: Simon + Eve went on a day out in Oxford.

unresolved.issue: Unclear place name — possibly a beach, pond or nature area near Thorpeness where Tinder the dog went in (water); transcription uncertain

boundary_flags.note: Page B_0338_L begins mid-page with a previous trip ending (visit to Eben, home after lunch on Sunday). This trip starts at 'Monday July 20th' heading.

summary: A summer week at Thorpeness in Suffolk in July 2020, with most of the family (Charles absent) travelling via Wimpole Hall where they met up with John, Kay and Eben for a socially-distanced lunch in the gardens. Simon and Eve made a day trip to Oxford on the Saturday.
extraction_notes: The page opens mid-page with the tail end of a previous trip (visiting Eben, a walk, home after lunch on Sunday) before the Monday July 20th heading marks this trip. 'Thorpe' in the text is a local shortening of Thorpeness. The Sunday entry ('Peter, Nana, Conrad, Nini + Gigi set off. ???') marks the departure of guests from Thorpeness; return to Birmingham is implied. '[?Pennels]' is an uncertain transcription of a place where Tinder went in — possibly a pond or the sea. Charles and Austin are explicitly noted as not on this trip. 'Socially distanced' reflects Covid-19 pandemic context (July 2020).
